source.title: WHO SAGO — Independent assessment of the origins of SARS-CoV-2
authors: Scientific Advisory Group for the Origins of Novel Pathogens (SAGO)
source.population: Global SARS-CoV-2 origins evidence through June 2025

position.quote: The weight of available evidence reviewed by SAGO suggests zoonotic spillover, but significant data gaps remain and SAGO is not in a position to rule out a laboratory origin.

factorWeights.factor: Epidemiological proximity of the earliest cases to the market
factorWeights.quote: The Huanan market appears to be a location for amplification, but it is not possible to determine if the first infections occurred there.

factorWeights.factor: Prior probability of a research-related accident in Wuhan
factorWeights.quote: Information and evidence is lacking to assess the possibility of a laboratory origin, so it cannot be ruled out.
